title: Blood Resource Pack
description: Blood Resource Pack turns Minecraft into a gruesome survival world. Weapons and mobs are forever bloodied and battered, creating a brutal, horror-like world that makes every adventure darker and far more perilous.
body:
Blood Resource Pack makes Minecraft a darker, more mature survival game. The added bloody details and realistic scars to Illagers, Villagers, and even weapons make the combat feel more visceral and dangerous.

Illagers & Villagers: Permanently scarred, bloodied, and battered from battle, with a forever grim and foreboding look.

Weapons & Items: The trident and the like are redesigned with blood-tipped blades, and every hit looks gruesome.

Immersive Atmosphere: The bloody and dark theme is constant, and raiding, village defense, and day-to-day survival all feel far more dangerous.

The Minecraft world never looks peaceful with the Blood Resource Pack — mobs and items will always be bloodied and scarred, and there is always a horror-like atmosphere.
